payload: {id:'8DfMHmLpqP',cs:50,ce:[[{v:1},,,,,,,,{v:2}],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,{v:4},,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[,,,,,,,,],[{v:3},,,,,,,,{v:6}]],ca:[{v:'title: Frak'},{v:'author: zetamath'},{v:'rules: Place the digits 1 to 9 once each into each row, column and region.  Regions need to be deduced by the solver and consist of 9 orthogonally-connected cells. For each blue line, digits on the line have an equal sum N within each region the line passes through. If a line passes through the same region more than once, each individual segment of such a line within that region sums to N separately. Every line must enter at least two regions. A digit in a circle indicates the number of digits on that particular segment of the line within that region. Not all circles are necessarily given.'}],l:[{wp:[[7.5,0.5],[1.5,0.5],[0.5,1.5],[0.5,7.5],[1.5,8.5],[7.5,8.5],[8.5,7.5],[8.5,1.5],[7.5,0.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{wp:[[7.5,3.5],[7.5,1.5],[1.5,1.5],[1.5,7.5],[3.5,7.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{wp:[[4.5,7.5],[6.5,7.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{wp:[[2.5,2.5],[2.5,3.5],[4.5,3.5],[5.5,2.5],[5.5,3.5],[6.5,4.5],[4.5,4.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{wp:[[6.5,3.5],[7.5,4.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{wp:[[4.5,6.5],[6.5,6.5],[6.5,5.5]],c:34BBE6,th:10},{c:34BBE6,th:10}],o:[{ct:[4.5,0.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[0.5,5.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[2.5,8.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[6.5,8.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[8.5,4.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''},{ct:[7.5,1.5],w:0.8,h:0.8,c1:#0,c2:#F,r:t,fs:12,te:''}],vd:[{id:'Sx2GQGw48Pg',publishedAt:'2022-03-01T20:30:03Z',t:'Mission Impossible:  Sudoku Edition',d:0}]}
